demographics.living_situation: shares a home with a housemate, who is present and helping

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I can't get off the toilet — it's just pure water pouring out of me, my stomach is twisting in knots, and now I'm so dizzy I nearly fall over every time I stand up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly last night and has got much worse — I can't keep any fluids in and I feel like I'm going to pass out when I stand.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 12 hours ago — started with nausea, then the watery diarrhoea began
symptom_narrative.character: loose, watery, unformed stools more than ten times so far, with painful cramping and a constant urgent feeling that I still need to go even when nothing's left
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst I've ever had — I'm bedbound and can't be more than a few steps from the bathroom
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: cramping low down across my belly, and the dizziness when I stand
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, coming in waves, not settling
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up makes me dizzy, and eating or drinking too fast makes the cramps worse

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: usually fit and well, no ongoing health problems

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: loperamide (Imodium) I bought from the chemist

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: no unusual food, no takeaway I can think of
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: no recent travel and no one around me has been sick; my housemate is trying to keep fluids up to me but I can't keep up with how much I'm losing

objective_data_offered.value: her housemate says she's been to the toilet more than ten times and can't stand up without nearly collapsing
I've barely passed any urine all day and what came out was really dark
lips and mouth look dry and cracked, looks pale and drained, keeps having to rush off to the bathroom
I can feel my heart pounding even when I'm lying completely still
